name: gemini-relay-extension
description: Agent Relay extension for Gemini CLI - multi-agent coordination via Relaycast
author: Agent Relay <hello@agent-relay.com>

scripts.check: node --check relay-server.js && sh -n hooks/after-tool-inbox.sh && sh -n hooks/after-agent-inbox.sh && sh -n hooks/before-model-inject.sh && sh -n hooks/session-start.sh && sh -n hooks/session-end.sh
